basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Mental Health and Neuro Sciences (NIMHANS)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Mental Health and Neuro Sciences (NIMHANS) Survey Coordinator Notification 2026 has been released on 29 May 2026 on the official website. A total of 01 vacancy has been announced through the NIMHANS Survey Coordinator Recruitment 2026.

all_official_links.label: Download NIMHANS Survey Coordinator Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for NIMHANS Survey Coordinator Recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Survey Coordinator post at NIMHANS is scheduled for 18 June 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Survey Coordinator position?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required for the Survey Coordinator position is a Bachelor Degree. Specific details can be confirmed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Survey Coordinator role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Survey Coordinator position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 50,000 per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Survey Coordinator post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Survey Coordinator post is 35 years. Age relaxation details, if any, will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Survey Coordinator post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Survey Coordinator post at NIMHANS.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for NIMHANS Survey Coordinator Recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Survey Coordinator role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Survey Coordinator role will involve a Walk-in-cum-Written Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at National Institute of Mental Health and Neuro Sciences (NIMHANS), Bengaluru, Karnataka, 560029.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs to the walk-in interview.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: The recruitment for the Survey Coordinator post is on a contract basis, as indicated in the job type.
